questions.stem: Which PowerShell Event ID captures the full content of executed script blocks?

answers.feedback: Event ID 4624 is a successful logon event, not script block logging.
Correct. Event ID 4104 in the PowerShell/Operational log captures script block content when Script Block Logging is enabled.
Event ID 4688 logs process creation, not PowerShell script block content.
Event ID 7045 logs new service installation, not PowerShell activity.

questions.explanation: Script Block Logging (Event ID 4104) captures the full text of all PowerShell script blocks to the Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell/Operational log.
